summary: Staged Flux rendering: 512x512 schnell preview during Sparky beats (kid sees illustration alongside text); 1024x1024 schnell HD on parent approve (background, fire-and-forget). VPS filesystem storage at /var/www/inklings/public/uploads/, served by Caddy. No Supabase or S3 dependency.
model_in_use: black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-schnell (FLUX.1-dev not on serverless tier; schnell is fast + cheap; HD uses same model at 1024x1024)

modified: src/app/api/sparky/beat/route.ts (calls generatePreview after Sparky text; quota-gated; logs UsageEvent kind='image_generated')
src/app/studio/story/client.tsx (renders for each page that has imageUrl)
src/app/studio/story/actions.ts (persists imageUrlLowres on BookPage during submit)
src/app/portal/approvals/page.tsx (renders preview thumbnails for each page in awaiting-parent books)
src/app/portal/approvals/actions.ts (approveBook fires HD generation in background; uses Promise.all for parallel page rendering)

storage.bucket_creation: mkdir -p done at first use via fs/promises mkdir({ recursive: true })

quota_guard.free_tier: 60 image_generated UsageEvents per 30d (covers ~3 stories × 7 beats + regenerations)
quota_guard.blocked_response: kid still sees prose; imageUrl=null; imageGenSource='quota_blocked' on response

consistency.seed_strategy: seedFromImageSeed() hashes Character.imageSeed (deterministic from name+species at character-create time)
consistency.result: same character renders consistently across all beats in a single story; if Character.imageSeed changes (regen), seed changes

fallback_chain: TogetherAI API error / non-2xx → imageUrl=null, imageGenSource='error'
Download failure when storing locally → imageUrl=null, imageGenSource='error'

verified.togetherai_smoke: POST to FLUX.1-schnell returns image URL within 3s (operator host smoke prior to env wire)
